description_long: This chest of drawers features a modern, boxy design with a natural wood finish on the top, sides, and base, contrasted by a white front panel. The front is equipped with three spacious drawers, each adorned with two square metallic handles, providing a sleek and contemporary look. The wood grain is visible and runs vertically on the sides and back, adding a touch of realism and warmth. The handles are evenly spaced and have a brushed metal appearance, enhancing the overall aesthetic. The back and sides are plain, with no additional features or embellishments. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece suitable for storage in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A modern chest of drawers with a wood grain finish, white drawer fronts, and square metallic handles, offering a clean and contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three white drawers with six square metallic handles set in a wood frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain surface with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, uninterrupted wood grain panel with no features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wood grain surface.
